result.summary: kmsinventory.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud KMS Inventory REST API at `https://kmsinventory.googleapis.com/` plus access through the `gcloud kms inventory` CLI; both require Google Cloud authentication via OAuth access tokens.
result.description: Google Cloud KMS Inventory lets you inventory Cloud KMS keys and inspect resources protected by those keys across a Google Cloud project. It is part of Google Cloud Key Management Service.

gcp_oauth_token.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token
gcp_oauth_token.setup: Authenticate with Google Cloud using the CLI, e.g. run `gcloud auth login` for a user account or `gcloud auth activate-service-account` for a service account, then use `gcloud auth print-access-token` to obtain an access token. The KMS Inventory client library pages also direct you to enable the API and set up authentication in Google Cloud. See [gcloud auth login](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/auth/login), [gcloud auth application-default login](https://docs.cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/auth/application-default/login), and the [KMS Inventory REST reference](https://docs.cloud.google.com/kms/docs/reference/inventory/rest).
